'''palate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:illusively|illusively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:illusively|illusively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| palate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:palate|palate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:palatesher|palatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:palatesherĂ«m|palatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:palatero|palatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:palateshĂ«|palateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:palateshĂ«m|palateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipalatero|gokipalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipalateshĂ«|gokipalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipalateshĂ«m|gokipalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopalankerom|gopalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopalankeshĂ«|gopalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopalankeshĂ«m|gopalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopalankeya|gopalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:palaterom|palaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:palatemu|palatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:palateya|palateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipalaterom|gokipalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipalatemu|gokipalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipalateya|gokipalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:palalate|palalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:palalatesher|palalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:palalatesherĂ«m|palalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:palalatero|palalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:palalateshĂ«|palalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:palalateshĂ«m|palalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipalalatero|gokipalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipalalateshĂ«|gokipalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipalalateshĂ«m|gokipalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopalalankerom|gopalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopalalankeshĂ«|gopalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopalalankeshĂ«m|gopalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopalalankeya|gopalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:palalaterom|palalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:palalatemu|palalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:palalateya|palalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipalalaterom|gokipalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipalalatemu|gokipalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipalalateya|gokipalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠte|pĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠtesher|pĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠtero|pĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠlĂŠtero|gokipĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠtemu|pĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠlĂŠteya|pĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠlĂŠterom|gokipĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠlĂŠteya|gokipĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:paflafte|paflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:paflaftesher|paflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paflaftesherĂ«m|paflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paflaftero|paflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:paflafteshĂ«|paflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paflafteshĂ«m|paflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipaflaftero|gokipaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipaflafteshĂ«|gokipaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaflafteshĂ«m|gokipaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopaflafnkerom|gopaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopaflafnkeshĂ«|gopaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopaflafnkeshĂ«m|gopaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopaflafnkeya|gopaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:paflafterom|paflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paflaftemu|paflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:paflafteya|paflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipaflafterom|gokipaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaflaftemu|gokipaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipaflafteya|gokipaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
